Name: Write to Target Beacon (Raw JSON)
Description: Writes a comprehension to a target entity on another DataBeacon, but wraps each source record into a raw-archive row { Identity, RawJSON, RecordMD5, IngestedAt, SourceTable } before sending. Use for clone-to-lake passes that preserve the source record verbatim rather than unfolding columns. The RecordMD5 lets later passes detect unchanged records cheaply.

EventInputs.Name: Execute
EventInputs.Description: Write the comprehension to the target beacon as raw-archive rows

SettingsInputs.Name: BeaconName
SettingsInputs.Description: Target beacon name for mesh routing

SettingsInputs.Name: ConnectionHash
SettingsInputs.Description: URL-safe slug of the target connection name

SettingsInputs.Name: Comprehension
SettingsInputs.Description: Comprehension to write: { Entity: { GUID: record, ... } }

SettingsInputs.Name: IdentityField
SettingsInputs.Description: Field on each source record to preserve as the Identity column (e.g. IDCustomer). If absent or missing on the record, falls back to the comprehension key (typically the GUID).

SettingsInputs.Name: SourceTable
SettingsInputs.Description: Original source table name; stored verbatim on every row in the SourceTable column for round-trip identification.

SettingsInputs.Name: SyncMode
SettingsInputs.Description: InsertOnly (default) or Upsert. Upsert matches on Identity + SourceTable + RecordMD5 to skip unchanged rows.
